testcase.name: test_TC_Navigation_003

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('#analytics')' Actual value: https://www.snappod.ai/analytics Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/analytics"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py#x1B[0m:30: in test_TC_Navigation_003 #x1B[0mexpect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(#x1B[33mr#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m#analytics#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m))#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('#analytics')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: https://www.snappod.ai/analytics #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 9 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/analytics"#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_Interaction_001

failure.message: AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')' Actual value: https://www.snappod.ai/login Call log: - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms 2 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/welcome-to-snappod-ai" 7 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/login"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_1_cdbd\test_page_1_cdbd.py#x1B[0m:48: in test_TC_Interaction_001 #x1B[0mexpect(page).to_have_url(re.compile(#x1B[33mr#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m/signup#x1B[39;49;00m#x1B[33m"#x1B[39;49;00m))#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Page URL expected to be 're.compile('/signup')'#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: https://www.snappod.ai/login #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_have_url" with timeout 5000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 2 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/welcome-to-snappod-ai"#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 7 × unexpected value "https://www.snappod.ai/login"#x1B[0m

testcase.name: test_TC_LanguageSelection_001

failure.message: playwright._impl._errors.TimeoutError: Locator.click: Timeout 30000ms exceeded. Call log: - waiting for locator("button.language-button").first - locator resolved to <button class="language-button">…</button> - attempting click action 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 20ms 2 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 100ms 53 × waiting for element to be visible, enabled and stable - element is not stable - retrying click action - waiting 500ms
